'''Brugga''' was an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] located in the [[Latoma system/Legends|Latoma system]] of the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]]. It orbited the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] [[Red dwarf/Legends|red dwarf]] [[Star/Legends|star]] at an extreme distance, making detection of the asteroid almost impossible for anyone who did not known exactly where to look. Brugga was the home of [[Ti'mere's InfoServices]], established in secret by [[Byro Ti'mere]]. The base was a safe house containing a small [[Hangar/Legends|hangar bay]] and several rooms. The base was also the location of Ti'mere's [[MicroThrust Processors]] [[SuperComp VII]] [[Computer/Legends|computer system]].<ref name="FBS">''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]''</ref>

The base was defended by two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], but secrecy and isolation was its major defence. In the event of visitors arriving in the Latoma system, the base was able to shut down for up to forty-eight [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] to avoid detection. Ti'mere also established the ruins of an outpost on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Latoma]] to fool those who entered the Latoma system searching for him.<ref name="FBS" />
